chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 416 of 2022 Applicant: Ashvant Kumar Dundas s/o. Chandu Lal Dundas, through Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Awan, advocate Respondent: The State, through Ms. Rahat Ehsan, Addl. Prosecutor General along with complainant Nasreen Ahsan w/o. Ahsan Shahzad --------------- Date of hearing: 30.05.2022 Date of order: 30.05.2022 --------------- O R D E R ZAFAR AHMED RAJPUT, J:- Through instant Cr. Bail Application, applicant/accused Ashvant Kumar Dundas s/o Chandu Lal Dundas seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 83 of 2022 registered under Section 489-F, P.P.C. at P.S. Defence, Karachi. His earlier bail application for the same relief bearing No. 560 of 2022 was dismissed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-XI, Karachi-South vide order, dated 28.02.2022. He was admitted to interim pre- arrest bail by this Court vide order, dated 02.03.2022, now the matter is fixed for confirmation of interim bail or otherwise. 2. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant states that the applicant is ready to pay off the amount of alleged cheque i.e. Rs. 1,20,000/-to the complainant in six months i.e. from June to November, 2022 and for that he has already prepared six cheques for the said amount, to be drawn from 1st June 20202 to 1st November, 2022, which he is ready to handover to the complainant. Complainant, who is present in Court, on having agreed to the proposal of the applicant receives all six cheques and puts her signature on photostat copies of such cheques as acknowledgement, so also, records her no objection on the confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant.

Rs. 1,20,000/-to the complainant in six months i.e. from June to November, 2022 and for that he has already prepared six cheques for the said amount, to be drawn from 1st June 20202 to 1st November, 2022, which he is ready to handover to the complainant. Complainant, who is present in Court, on having agreed to the proposal of the applicant receives all six cheques and puts her signature on photostat copies of such cheques as acknowledgement, so also, records her no objection on the confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant. 2 3. Accordingly, the interim bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 02.03.2022 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. However, in case any of the cheques handed over by the applicant to complainant is dishonored, the complainant shall be at liberty to seeks cancellation of pre-arrest bail granted to applicant. Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Athar Zai
